description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques applicable to cloud/AWS environments. Filtered from the full Enterprise matrix to cloud-relevant entries. Source: MITRE ATT&CK (attack.mitre.org).

tactics.name: Initial Access
tactics.description: Techniques to gain an initial foothold in the cloud environment

sub_techniques.name: Cloud Accounts
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may use compromised cloud account credentials to gain access

techniques.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit vulnerabilities in internet-facing applications

techniques.name: Trusted Relationship
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit trusted third-party relationships to gain access

techniques.name: External Remote Services
techniques.description: Adversaries may use external remote services as initial access vector

sub_techniques.name: Malicious Image
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may rely on users running malicious container images or AMIs

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse command and scripting interpreters to execute commands

tactics.name: Persistence
tactics.description: Techniques to maintain foothold across restarts or credential changes

sub_techniques.name: Additional Cloud Credentials
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may add credentials to cloud accounts to maintain access

sub_techniques.name: Additional Cloud Roles
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may add additional roles or permissions to maintain access

techniques.name: Implant Internal Image
techniques.description: Adversaries may implant cloud images with malicious code

sub_techniques.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may modify MFA settings to weaken authentication

sub_techniques.name: Cloud Accounts
sub_techniques.description: Using valid cloud accounts for privilege escalation through role assumption

techniques.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
techniques.description: Adversaries may circumvent access control mechanisms to gain elevated access

sub_techniques.name: Disable or Modify Cloud Logs
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may disable or modify cloud logging to avoid detection

sub_techniques.name: Disable or Modify Tools
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may disable security monitoring tools

sub_techniques.name: Application Access Token
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may use stolen application access tokens to bypass authentication

sub_techniques.name: File Deletion
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may delete files to cover tracks

techniques.name: Steal Application Access Token
techniques.description: Adversaries may steal application access tokens for credential access

sub_techniques.name: Cloud Instance Metadata API
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may use the cloud instance metadata API to collect credentials

tactics.name: Discovery
tactics.description: Techniques to gain knowledge about the environment

techniques.name: Cloud Infrastructure Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may discover cloud infrastructure components

techniques.name: Cloud Storage Object Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may enumerate cloud storage objects

techniques.name: Cloud Service Dashboard
techniques.description: Adversaries may use cloud service dashboards for reconnaissance

tactics.name: Lateral Movement
tactics.description: Techniques to move through the environment

sub_techniques.name: Cloud Services
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may use cloud services to move laterally

sub_techniques.name: Application Access Token
sub_techniques.description: Using stolen tokens for lateral movement

tactics.name: Collection
tactics.description: Techniques to gather data of interest

techniques.name: Data from Cloud Storage
techniques.description: Adversaries may access data from cloud storage without proper authorization

sub_techniques.name: Code Repositories
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may access data from code repositories

tactics.name: Exfiltration
tactics.description: Techniques to steal data from the environment

techniques.name: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
techniques.description: Adversaries may transfer data to an adversary-controlled cloud account

sub_techniques.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
sub_techniques.description: Adversaries may exfiltrate data to cloud storage services
aws_relevance: data exfil via S3 to external bucket
VPC endpoint bypass for data transfer

tactics.name: Impact
tactics.description: Techniques to disrupt availability or integrity

techniques.name: Data Destruction
techniques.description: Adversaries may destroy data and files on cloud resources

techniques.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
techniques.description: Adversaries may encrypt data to disrupt availability (ransomware)
aws_relevance: KMS key policy modification to deny decryption

techniques.name: Service Stop
techniques.description: Adversaries may stop cloud services to disrupt availability

techniques.name: Resource Hijacking
techniques.description: Adversaries may use cloud resources for their own purposes (cryptomining)

techniques.name: Network Denial of Service
techniques.description: Adversaries may perform network DoS against cloud endpoints
